name: Girls of Stockholm
overview: In the first season of Girls of Stockholm, we get to know four of Sweden's most established influencers, Lovisa Worge, Klara Elvgren, Alice Stenlöf and Hanna Friberg. The girls travel to Marbella to work and give it a chance to get to know each other better. Despite their differences.

trailers.title: Girls of Stockholm - Officiell Trailer | Prime Video Sverige
